question.stem: A civic open-data portal standardizes category codes across agencies and stakeholders ask whether a chart supports a policy claim. What should analysts do first?
choices: Examine sampling method and possible bias in the dataset
Choose the chart with the highest values
question.explanation: Data interpretation quality depends on collection method and bias considerations. A common wrong choice is "Choose the chart with the highest values" because it sounds plausible but does not address the core condition. Takeaway: identify the exact requirement before selecting an approach.
